name: claude-harness
description: Shared, project-neutral Claude Code harness for JDSavvy's repos (GameStats, rally, future apps). Same skill names/functions everywhere; each project tailors only its stack-specific bits locally.

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: Canonical, stack-agnostic harness: the /spec skill (goal -> researched GitHub issue ready for @claude) and the /implement-pr skill (drive a mentioned PR to done — reconcile against drift as a pre-step, then implement & fix it merge-ready), plus generic code-reviewer and test-runner subagents.
